title: Water Works Project
description: Initiated by Field Records, Waterworks covers over 50 Dutch waterworks developed across Japan during the Meiji era. Navigate around the map and click on sites' names to learn about their development — often accompanied by visual or sonic impressions.

body.fontFamily: "IBM Plex Mono", "IB Plex Sans JP", monospace
